r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Weight gain and symptoms are due to menopause, aging, lack of willpower, or eating too much. Traditional diet advice (calories in/calories out, low-fat, exercise more) should work if you just try harder.
emotional_amplifiers: Villain: One-size-fits-all diet advice / Generic diet industry (misinformation)
relatability_triggers: If you've struggled to lose weight and keep it off, you could have a problem with your metabolism.

Existing belief: Weight gain and symptoms are due to menopause, aging, lack of willpower, or eating too much. Traditional diet advice (calories in/calories out, low-fat, exercise more) should work if you just try harder.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Metabolism B Reset System / The Metabolism Miracle: More than 100 million Americans have what is called Metabolism B. And what that means is your particular metabolism overreacts to carbohydrates and quickly stores their calories as fat! Unlike people with Metabolism A (standard metabolism), people with Metabolism B have a biochemical difference that causes their bodies to react differently to carbohydrate intake - storing carbs as fat quickly and efficiently regardless of calorie intake or exercise. The Metabolism Miracle is the first and only total lifestyle program specifically designed to work WITH Metabolism B instead of against it, allowing you to reset your metabolism so you can eat carbs 6 times a day and still lose weight.
mechanism_proof_points: Diane Kress RD, CDE - Registered Dietitian, Certified Diabetes Educator
6,000+ private practice patients over 13 years of clinical work
Multiple patient testimonials with before/after results
More than 100 million Americans identified with Metabolism B
unique_differentiators: The first and only total lifestyle program specifically designed for Metabolism B - the metabolic type that 100+ million Americans have. Unlike generic diets, this program works WITH your metabolism's biochemical programming instead of against it, letting you eat carbs 6 times a day and still lose 10-30+ pounds.

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Weight gain and symptoms are due to menopause, aging, lack of willpower, or eating too much. Traditional diet advice (calories in/calories out, low-fat, exercise more) should work if you just try harder.
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Metabolism B - a specific metabolic type that more than 100 million Americans have where your particular metabolism biochemically overreacts to carbohydrates and quickly stores their calories as fat, regardless of calories or exercise. It's a metabolic condition, not a character flaw.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Every diet and exercise program failed because they were designed for people with standard metabolism (Metabolism A), not Metabolism B. Generic low-fat diets, calorie restriction, even exercise couldn't overcome your body's biochemical programming to overreact to carbs and store fat. You were fighting your metabolism instead of working with it.

villain_profile.villain_name: One-size-fits-all diet advice / Generic diet industry
villain_profile.villain_motivation: The diet industry treats everyone the same, pushing generic low-fat, calorie-restriction advice that works for Metabolism A people but actively sabotages Metabolism B people. They ignore metabolic differences because selling one solution to everyone is easier and more profitable.
villain_profile.villain_evidence: 100 million Americans struggling despite following conventional diet advice. The confusion between menopause symptoms and metabolic issues. Diane Kress discovered through 6,000+ patients over 13 years that half the population has a different metabolism type that requires completely different approach.

mechanism.name: Metabolism B Reset System / The Metabolism Miracle
mechanism.explanation_text: More than 100 million Americans have what is called Metabolism B. And what that means is your particular metabolism overreacts to carbohydrates and quickly stores their calories as fat! Unlike people with Metabolism A (standard metabolism), people with Metabolism B have a biochemical difference that causes their bodies to react differently to carbohydrate intake - storing carbs as fat quickly and efficiently regardless of calorie intake or exercise. The Metabolism Miracle is the first and only total lifestyle program specifically designed to work WITH Metabolism B instead of against it, allowing you to reset your metabolism so you can eat carbs 6 times a day and still lose weight.
credibility_anchors: Diane Kress RD, CDE - Registered Dietitian, Certified Diabetes Educator
6,000+ private practice patients over 13 years of clinical work
Multiple patient testimonials with before/after results
More than 100 million Americans identified with Metabolism B
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: The first and only total lifestyle program specifically designed for Metabolism B - the metabolic type that 100+ million Americans have. Unlike generic diets, this program works WITH your metabolism's biochemical programming instead of against it, letting you eat carbs 6 times a day and still lose 10-30+ pounds.

e5_mechanism_type.explanation: Metabolism B isn't entirely new science - metabolic differences and insulin resistance have been documented. However, framing weight loss failure as a metabolic TYPE issue (B vs A), identifying that 100 million Americans have this specific condition, and positioning it as the hidden cause behind what people think is menopause or lack of willpower is a powerful reframe. It takes known metabolic science and reframes both the problem (you don't have willpower problem, you have Metabolism B) and the villain (generic one-size-fits-all diets that ignore metabolic differences). The breakthrough is recognizing you're fighting a biochemical condition, not a character flaw.
e5_mechanism_type.market_sophistication_fit: Stage 3-4: Market is familiar with diets, metabolism, low-carb approaches. But this reframes the core problem (it's not about carbs being bad - it's about your specific METABOLISM TYPE and how it processes carbs) and identifies the villain (one-size-fits-all diet advice that ignores metabolic differences). It shifts blame from the person to the condition and from carbs themselves to metabolic processing.

Perfect pairing - mechanism shows biological root cause, villain shows systemic failure to address it.

proof_inventory.proof_sequence: Opens immediately with massive data point (100M Americans) to establish scale and create identification. Quickly follows with authority credentials (Diane Kress RD, CDE, 25+ years, 6000+ patients, Prevention Magazine) to establish credibility. Then demonstrates promise through specific outcomes (lose 10-30 lbs, eat carbs 6x daily). Weaves mechanism explanation as proof throughout. Backs with patient testimonials. Closes with uniqueness claim (first and only program for Metabolism B).

story_architecture.note: No extended narrative story present in this magalog. The format relies on problem-identification, mechanism revelation, and transformation promise rather than personal story arc. Brief patient testimonials present but no single extended story.
